Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: The Studium app is an essential companion app for all Studium Members.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters member rank display:
- Caches each verified member's Lodestone FC rank during Studium access checks.
- Shows the active member name and FC rank above the Crafters gear-set selector with rank-based coloring.
Punchline: An essential companion app for all Studium members.
